title: mentha bastardiana
intro: Mentha bastardiana, also known as American Pennyroyal, is a plant species in the mint family that is native to North America. It has been used for its medicinal properties, including its ability to act as a natural antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antispasmodic agent, making it effective in treating various health issues. The health benefits of Mentha bastardiana include its ability to alleviate menstrual cramps, improve digestion, and reduce fever, making it a popular herbal remedy. Herbal preparations of Mentha bastardiana include teas, infusions, and essential oils, which can be used topically or internally to harness its medicinal properties.
